name: 00 Repo Audit & Setup
description: Planning, Linear setup, decisions, and documentation required before implementation work.

name: 01 MVP Foundation
description: Canonical product surface, routing, navigation, tenancy, data model, and E2E contract.

name: 02 Core Product Flow
description: Project creation, trace import, eval review, grader review, prompt optimization, routing/caching, and reports.

name: 03 Production Readiness
description: Auth verification, RLS/storage isolation, vendor smoke, workers, privacy operations, and deployment hardening.

name: 04 Launch Candidate
description: Commercial, support, legal, observability, accessibility, and final smoke pass.

name: 05 Later Enhancements
description: Non-MVP integrations, SDKs, analytics expansion, and broader product polish.
